# Task
Name: prompt/context-new
Title: Context prompt (new workspace)
Branch: prompt/context-new
Directory: .subtask/tasks/prompt--context-new
Follow-up: continuing from ctx/task
Note: New workspace, branch checked out fresh.

## Workspace
Your working directory is `/tmp/ws`. This IS your copy of the project — a git worktree of `main` on branch `prompt/context-new`.

- Use paths relative to cwd, or absolute paths under cwd.
- Never use absolute paths to other clones of this project (e.g. `/Users/.../Code/<projectname>`). Edits outside your worktree will not appear on your task branch and will not merge.
- If unsure, run `pwd` and `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` — both should match cwd.

## Description
Continue the previous work.

Continue.
